git.head: not_recorded_in_artifact
git.policy: git metadata excluded to keep artifact replay portable

iteration9_handoff.handoff_question: Can I9 replay and classify the h4/L5 stress evidence with both I8 minimal shared-medium support and I8-A additional margin support, without treating 8-A as a replacement or promotion?

limit_rows_for_i9.n18_i8a_row_03_h4_hidden_budget_relief_c: rejected hidden budget relief / budget-policy-change control

margin_evidence.canonical_precision_rule: JSON stores numeric scores directly before report formatting; I9 replay must preserve numeric margin without threshold changes.
